AccountIdentityCard.title: Profile Picture
AccountIdentityCard.description: Paste a link to an image to use as your avatar.

ProfileInformationCard.title: Profile Information
ProfileInformationCard.nameValidation: Enter at least a first and last name.

NewsletterSubscriptionCard.title: Newsletter
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.description: Manage your subscription to the openJII community newsletter.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.subscribed: You are subscribed to the community newsletter.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.pending: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox to finish subscribing.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.unsubscribed: Subscribe to receive community news and updates.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.error: We couldn't load your newsletter subscription. Your other settings are still available.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.updateError: We couldn't update your newsletter subscription. Please try again.
NewsletterSubscriptionCard.forgottenEmailError: This email was removed from our newsletter at your earlier request and can't be re-added automatically. Please contact support if you'd like to subscribe again.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Account
deactivate.dialogDescription: This will temporarily disable your account and hide your profile from other users.

warningList.profileHidden: Your profile will be hidden from other researchers
warningList.contentAccessible: Your experiments, macros, and protocols will remain accessible to collaborators
warningList.loggedOut: You will be logged out of your account
warningList.canReactivate: You can reactivate your account by logging in again

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
delete.dialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. Your personal data will be permanently erased, but your published contributions will remain.

warningPreserveList.content: Experiments, macros, and protocols will remain intact

delete.successMessage: Account deleted. Your personal data has been erased.

blockers.title: Hand over your experiments first
blockers.description: You're the only admin of the experiments below, so they'd be left without an owner. Choose who should take over admin rights, then transfer. You can do it all here.
blockers.applyToAllPlaceholder: Search someone to take over everything…
blockers.noCandidatesHint: No collaborators yet. Search anyone above, or invite someone via the experiment's collaborators page.
blockers.transferPartial: Some experiments couldn't be updated. Please review and try again.
blockers.transferError: Couldn't transfer admin rights. Please try again.
